2a19de79-f9ea-4ab7-9bdc-255022975a29.label: text_chunk
2a19de79-f9ea-4ab7-9bdc-255022975a29.text:
Non-Disclosure / Confidentiality Agreement
Partner Ireland Insurance Limited
-and-
Individual(s) submitting information via the eHandshake on partnerre.com

PARTIES

(1) Partner  Ireland  Insurance  Limited of  5 th Floor,

  Block  1,  The  Oval,  160  Shelbourne  Road, Dublin 4, Ireland and registered in Ireland with company number 395190.

96d57cdb-6b17-47e2-8b76-f920fa2a1654.label: text_chunk
96d57cdb-6b17-47e2-8b76-f920fa2a1654.text:
(2) Individual(s) submitting information via the interactive e-handshake on partnerre.com

Each a “Party” and collectively referred to as the “Parties”.

BACKGROUND

In  order  to  allow  the  Parties  to  engage  in  insurance  mediation  activities  (the “Business  Under Discussion”) the Parties have agreed to enter into this non-disclosure / confidentiality agreement (the “Agreement”)  with  respect  to  all  Information

a4a8d85d-dab2-45d8-8fbc-e622f01576e2.label: text_chunk
a4a8d85d-dab2-45d8-8fbc-e622f01576e2.text:
(as  hereinafter  defined)  furnished  by  one  Party  (the “Providing  Party”)  to  the  other  (the  “Receiving  Party”).

    The  execution  of  this  Agreement  does  not constitute the creation of a business relationship.

IT IS AGREED

1.

b45d11f2-bf60-4300-a85e-0271d850568a.label: text_chunk
b45d11f2-bf60-4300-a85e-0271d850568a.text: The Receiving Party agrees to treat all information provided by the Providing Party in connection with the Business Under Discussion to the Receiving Partner and/or any of its partners, directors, officers,  employees,  affiliates,  insurers,  agents,  advisors  or  auditors (the  “Representatives”), regardless  of  the  manner  in  which  it  is  so  furnished,  together  with  any  analyses,  compilations, data,

69e116ff-c288-4b9c-9b5a-396ac86d3638.label: text_chunk
69e116ff-c288-4b9c-9b5a-396ac86d3638.text:
studies  or  other  documents  or  records,  whether  of  an  oral,  written  or  electronically retrievable nature (collectively the “Information”), as strictly confidential.

2.

  The  Receiving  Party  shall  limit  the  possession  and  use  of  the  Information to  a  “need-to-know” basis among its Representatives.

3.  Information does not include, however,

7e67e424-fa22-4726-856f-adac23523dd7.label: text_chunk
7e67e424-fa22-4726-856f-adac23523dd7.text: information which (a) is or becomes generally available to the  public;  (b)  was  available  to  the  Receiving  Party  on  a  non-confidential  basis  prior  to  its disclosure  by  the  Providing  Party;  (c)  is  independently  developed  by  the  Receiving  Party;

8fe4e72b-0a77-46c8-a0df-6a7eff4d5755.label: text_chunk
8fe4e72b-0a77-46c8-a0df-6a7eff4d5755.text:
or  (d) becomes available to the Receiving Party on a non-confidential basis after the date hereof from a third  party  which  was  not  known  by  the  Receiving  Party  to  be  subject  to  a  confidentiality agreement  with  the  Providing  Party  and  which  is  not  otherwise  prohibited  from  transmitting  the information to the Receiving Party.

4.

  The  Receiving

532eaf35-e9b6-4062-bb95-4f60c10e457e.label: text_chunk
532eaf35-e9b6-4062-bb95-4f60c10e457e.text: Party  agrees  that  the  Information  will  be  used  solely  for  giving  effect  to  the Business  Under  Discussion  and  further  that  it  will  not  disclose  to  any  person  (i)  the  Information and (ii) the fact that the Information  has  been made available to the Receiving  Party  or that the Receiving  Party  have  inspected  any  portion  of

5bf6efd3-ec2d-4e51-81c3-90382896c47b.label: text_chunk
5bf6efd3-ec2d-4e51-81c3-90382896c47b.text:
the  Information,  for  any  reason  or  purpose whatsoever, unless the Providing Party has consented in writing to such disclosure or except as stated otherwise herein or as required by law, order, decree, regulation, or governmental agency request.

  The  term  “person”  as  used  in  these  provisions  shall  be  broadly  interpreted  to  include without limitation any corporation, company, partnership, individual or group.

5.

8e2f4c1b-8b1e-4b51-8518-d6f6312a3765.label: text_chunk
8e2f4c1b-8b1e-4b51-8518-d6f6312a3765.text: In  the  event  that  the  Receiving  Party  is  required  by  applicable  law  or  regulation  or  by  legal process  to  disclose  any  of  the  Information,  the  Receiving  Party  agrees  that  it  will  provide  the Providing Party with prompt written notice of such request(s) prior to the required disclosure and the Providing Party shall use reasonable efforts, at its own expense,

16abbc09-f3f3-4710-b8af-066ab205bde2.label: text_chunk
16abbc09-f3f3-4710-b8af-066ab205bde2.text:
to seek a protective order or other  appropriate  remedy.

    If  a  protective  order  or  other  remedy  is  not  obtained  and  a  waiver hereunder is not received, the Receiving Party shall disclose only that portion of the Information which  is  legally  required  and  shall  use  its  best  efforts  to  obtain  assurances  that  confidential treatment will be accorded to such Information.

6.

65650739-79fa-4b7c-95f7-c7b37e9cfc5a.label: text_chunk
65650739-79fa-4b7c-95f7-c7b37e9cfc5a.text: If  any  of  the  Parties  determine  that  they  do  not  wish  to  proceed  or  continue  with  the  Business Under  Discussion,  it  will  promptly  advise  the  other  Party  of  that  decision  in  writing  or  by  email.

c0a9960a-a1f9-4187-806b-c4e9fc3e823b.label: text_chunk
c0a9960a-a1f9-4187-806b-c4e9fc3e823b.text: Upon  receipt  of  such  communication  the  Receiving  Party  shall  destroy  promptly  all  documents furnished and will not retain any copies, extracts or other reproductions in whole or in part of such Information.

61f15b58-5a3e-49e5-9663-8ee3e04532b8.label: text_chunk
61f15b58-5a3e-49e5-9663-8ee3e04532b8.text:
Notwithstanding  the  foregoing,  the  Receiving  Party  shall  be  entitled  to  retain  that portion  of  the  Information  for  legal,  regulatory  or  internal  compliance  purposes,  which  will continue to be treated as confidential on the terms hereof.

7.

543d7b2f-9c0d-4105-98ba-616cb1951496.label: text_chunk
543d7b2f-9c0d-4105-98ba-616cb1951496.text:
The Parties agree and understand that,

 notwithstanding any pending or future disputes between them or any claims relating to or arising from such disputes, the provision of the Information is not intended to and should not be construed as a waiver of any confidentiality or privilege over such material for any other purpose and such confidentiality and privileges are expressly reserved.

8.

ba94e5a7-6da0-4cd0-823d-4e03349b3e8f.label: text_chunk
ba94e5a7-6da0-4cd0-823d-4e03349b3e8f.text: Any  breach  or  threatened  breach  of  this  Agreement  shall  constitute  a  breach  that  may  cause irreparable  injury,  not  readily  measurable  in  money,  and  for  which  the  Providing  Party,  without waiving any other rights or remedies at law or in equity, shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief or other equitable relief.

d8d3ffa0-9d9a-42f9-b546-0684b27096fd.label: text_chunk
d8d3ffa0-9d9a-42f9-b546-0684b27096fd.text:
Any such right or remedy and any and all other rights or remedies provided for  herein  shall  be  cumulative  and  not  exclusive  and  in  addition  to  any  and  all  other  rights  or remedies which the Providing Party may have under this Agreement or otherwise.

9.  The Parties agree that,

 in the event of loss or damage to the Providing Party as a result of breach of the provisions of this Agreement,

f91af62e-c6b8-460e-903a-20c3a9151eaa.label: text_chunk
f91af62e-c6b8-460e-903a-20c3a9151eaa.text: the  Receiving Party shall be liable only in respect of loss or damage  resulting  directly  from  the  breach,  and  no  liability  will  be  accepted  in  respect  of  any special,  indirect,  incidental  or  consequential  losses  or  damages  whatsoever  (including,  but  not limited  to,

aaef4729-a782-432a-820d-4722e0190106.label: text_chunk
aaef4729-a782-432a-820d-4722e0190106.text:
lost  profits  or  revenue)  suffered  by  the  Providing  Party  or  any  person  connected  with the Providing Party, arising out of the performance or breach of this Agreement, whether claims for said losses or damages are premised on contract, tort (including negligence), or otherwise.

10.

07e55029-df0b-4e02-b22a-5f7e42574718.label: text_chunk
07e55029-df0b-4e02-b22a-5f7e42574718.text: It is further understood and agreed that no failure or delay by any of the Parties to this Agreement in exercising any right, power or privilege hereunder  shall operate as a waiver thereof, nor shall any single or partial exercise thereof preclude any other or further exercise thereof or the exercise of  any  right,  power  or  privilege  hereunder.

625871a2-1e16-4cc0-af01-ad3bf64a3493.label: text_chunk
625871a2-1e16-4cc0-af01-ad3bf64a3493.text:
No  modification,  amendment  or  waiver  of  this Agreement shall be binding unless it is in writing and signed by each of the Parties. There are no third party beneficiaries to this Agreement.

11.

3430d84e-7d24-4ad5-951f-5551bd60cb1f.label: text_chunk
3430d84e-7d24-4ad5-951f-5551bd60cb1f.text:
This  Agreement  shall  be  governed  in  accordance  with  the  laws  of  England  and  Wales  without giving  effect  to  conflict  of  law  principles,  and  the  Parties  agree  to  submit  to  the  non-exclusive jurisdiction of the English courts.

12.

3bb8298b-e8ec-4205-8ff2-ed48ba1fa495.label: text_chunk
3bb8298b-e8ec-4205-8ff2-ed48ba1fa495.text: This  Agreement  constitutes  the  entire  and  only  agreement  between  the  Parties  relating  to  the non-disclosure of information.END

The summary of the relationships involving the Parties is as follows:

1. **Engagement in Business**: The Parties are actively engaging in discussions related to a Business Under Discussion, specifically focusing on insurance mediation activities. This indicates a collaborative effort to negotiate and deliberate on the business matter.

2. **Provision of Information**: As part of their agreement, the Parties are responsible for providing necessary information, which is protected under confidentiality and privilege, ensuring that sensitive details are handled appropriately.

3. **Involvement in Agreement**: The Parties are directly involved in an Agreement that outlines their rights and obligations, establishing a formal framework for their interactions.

4. **Obligation to Adhere**: The Parties are bound by the terms of the Agreement, which they must follow as stipulated in the document, reinforcing their commitment to the established terms.

5. **Legal Jurisdiction**: The Parties have agreed to submit to the jurisdiction of the English courts, indicating that any disputes arising from their relationship will be resolved within this legal framework.

Overall, these relationships highlight the Parties' collaborative efforts in business negotiations, their commitment to confidentiality, and their legal obligations under the Agreement, as well as the agreed-upon jurisdiction for dispute resolution.

community_summary.8:
The relationships outlined involve the "Receiving Party" and the "Providing Party," focusing on the management and handling of confidential information. 

1. **Receiving Party and Representatives**: The Receiving Party is permitted to share confidential information with its Representatives, who are authorized to access and manage that information, emphasizing the importance of trust and authorization in information sharing.

2. **Possession and Use of Information**: The Receiving Party holds responsibility for the possession and use of the Information, which must be restricted to a need-to-know basis among its Representatives. This highlights the necessity of limiting access to sensitive information to maintain confidentiality.

3. **Notification Obligations**: The Receiving Party is obligated to notify the Providing Party of any legal requests for disclosure of information. This establishes a communication channel between the two parties, ensuring transparency and compliance with legal requirements.

4. **Handling of Information**: The Receiving Party is tasked with handling the Information in accordance with legal standards and confidentiality obligations, indicating a duty to protect the integrity and confidentiality of the shared data.

5. **Retention of Information**: The Receiving Party has the right to retain certain portions of the Information for legal, regulatory, or internal compliance purposes. This indicates a formal relationship where the Receiving Party is empowered to keep specific information necessary for compliance.

Overall, these relationships underscore the critical responsibilities of the Receiving Party in managing confidential information, ensuring legal compliance, and maintaining effective communication with the Providing Party.

community_summary.21:
The relationships summarized below highlight the interactions involving the entity "Discloser" and its connections with "Recipient," "Client," "Confidential Information," and "Affiliates":

1. **Discloser and Recipient**: The Discloser provides and discloses information to the Recipient under confidentiality agreements, establishing a relationship based on trust and the protection of sensitive data.
